name: East Tender Optoelectronics Corporation
summary: East Tender Optoelectronics Corporation manufactures and sells optical thin film filters in Taiwan and internationally. It offers narrowband filter chips for use in the telecom industry applications, as well as custom narrowband filters for non telecom applications. The company also provides broadband filter chips, including banded skip filter chips, filter components for FTTx, CWDM filter components, and gain flattening filters; and customized products, such as coated WDM on pigtail for hi isolation application, IR-cut filters for digital still cameras and CCM applications, and R/G/B filters for digital lighting processing projectors. East Tender Optoelectronics Corporation was founded in 2000 and is based in Yilan City, Taiwan.
